overview.description: The GraniteShares 2x Long PDD Daily ETF (PDDL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of PDD Holdings Inc. stock. PDDL was launched on Jul 15, 2025 and is issued by GraniteShares.
